Download Table 1. Antiviral Medications Recommended for Treatment and Chemoprophylaxis of Influenza [41 KB, 2 pages] 
Abbreviations: N/A = not applicable, COPD = chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
Oral oseltamivir phosphate is approved by the FDA for treatment of acute uncomplicated influenza within 2 days of illness onset in people 14 days and older, and for chemoprophylaxis in people 1 year and older. Although not part of the FDA-approved indications, use of oral oseltami
